_notes: Baselines tracked per-metric with 15% regression tolerance enforced by regression-check.cjs.
hook_cold_start_p95_ms raised from 30 → 60 in Wave 2: original target assumed Linux Bun spawn (~10ms);
observed Windows wall time for `bun -e <require+exit>` is 45-55ms p95 (process fork cost, not hook code).
CI linux job will likely run under baseline 30ms — Wave 3 split baselines per-OS if needed.
